title: pelargonium nummulifolium
intro: Pelargonium nummulifolium, also known as the Cape Geranium or Geranium, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pelargonium nummulifolium include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its full range of uses.
